verses.1: For the music director. A Psalm of David. May the LORD answer you on a day of trouble! May the name of the God of Jacob protect you!
verses.2: May He send you help from the sanctuary, And support you from Zion!
verses.3: May He remember all your meal offerings And accept your burnt offering! Selah
verses.4: May He grant you your heart’s desire And fulfill your whole plan!
verses.5: We will sing for joy over your victory, And in the name of our God we will set up our banners. May the LORD fulfill all your desires.
verses.6: Now I know that the LORD saves His anointed; He will answer him from His holy heaven With the saving strength of His right hand.
verses.7: Some praise their chariots and some their horses, But we will praise the name of the LORD, our God.
verses.8: They have bowed down and fallen, But we have risen and stood upright.
verses.9: Save, LORD; May the King answer us on the day we call.
